title: Agraphon (Acts 20:35)
date_of_composition: Lukan composition c. 80–90 CE; underlying tradition probably earlier.
scope_note: An agraphon — a saying of Jesus not recorded in the canonical gospels but preserved by Paul (via Lukan narration of his Miletus speech) as something 'the Anointed himself said.' One of the few non-gospel attestations of a dominical saying.

pericopes.title: More blessed to give than to receive

verses.text: παντα υπεδειξα υµιν οτι ουτωσ κοπιωντασ δει αντιλαµβανεσθαι των ασθενουντων µνηµονευειν τε των λογων του κυριου ιησου οτι αυτοσ ειπεν μακαριον εστιν µαλλον διδοναι η λαµβανειν
verses.transliteration: panta ypedeixa ymin oti oytōs kopiōntas dei antilambanesthai tōn asthenoyntōn mnēmoneyein te tōn logōn toy kyrioy iēsoy oti aytos eipen makarion estin mallon didonai ē lambanein
